name: uniz-production-vault
description: UniZ Microservices Production Ecosystem - Master Vault

scripts.watch: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@76.13.241.174 "watch -n 1 'kubectl get hpa; echo; kubectl get pods'"
scripts.install:all: for d in apps/uniz-* apps/ornate apps/ornate-core infra/core-infra; do (cd $d && npm install && npm audit fix); done
scripts.setup: cp secrets.env.example secrets.env && npm run vault:sync
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd apps/uniz-gateway && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-auth && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-user && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-portal && npm run dev"
